opportunities.summary: Silhouette comparison vs canonical PNG with ≤2 px tolerance on 1024-ref.
Per-component position tolerance check using component-visibility-map.json (≤4 px).
Detected sensor count must equal anchor map sensor count.
Keypad row/column inference must match anchor map.
Handle orientation classifier (left/right/none) vs anchor map.
Reject if foreign-product geometry (e.g., e-shield rim-lock box in an e-orbit run) is detected.
Reject any candidate containing legible text other than approved logos/marks.
Reject any candidate containing a face or full human figure.
Promotion-time check that every approved visual has a complete run record.
